item.title: STRP x BAG [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: STRP x BAG [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: crankv2
item.itunes:summary:
STRP x BAG
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
BulletRegister / Aim Assist / GyroDelayFixer
Magisk Module for Better Bullet Registation, Aim Assist & Gyro Delay Fix !

Auto Injector runs itself after Starting a Game !
Auto Injector Logs are also Stored inside /data/adb/modules/BulletAimGyro Folder

Use Termux for The New BAG MANAGER!
Command is:
su -c BM

Requirements:
Magisk 20.0+
Latest Brutal Busybox
Android 8.0+

Join Ur Group For More !
https://t.me/AndroidRootModulesCommunity
[read more]

Use Termux for The New BAG MANAGER!

Latest Brutal Busybox

item.content:encoded:
STRP x BAG
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
BulletRegister / Aim Assist / GyroDelayFixer
Magisk Module for Better Bullet Registation, Aim Assist & Gyro Delay Fix !

Auto Injector runs itself after Starting a Game !
Auto Injector Logs are also Stored inside /data/adb/modules/BulletAimGyro Folder

Use Termux for The New BAG MANAGER!
Command is:
su -c BM

Requirements:
Magisk 20.0+
Latest Brutal Busybox
Android 8.0+

item.title: ROG CAM [PORT] [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: ROG CAM [PORT] [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
ROG CAM [PORT]
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The ROG Camera Port APK, ported by revWhiteShadow, is an Android application that brings the powerful camera features of ROG (Republic of Gamers) devices to all Android smartphones and tablets. This ported version allows users to enjoy the advanced photography capabilities found in ROG devices without the need for owning one.
The ROG Camera Port APK offers a range of features designed to enhance your photography experience. It provides access to a variety of shooting modes, including HDR (High Dynamic Range), Pro mode for manual control over settings like ISO and shutter speed, Night mode for capturing low-light scenes, and Panorama mode for capturing wide-angle landscapes.

Additionally, the app offers various filters and editing tools to personalize your photos and add artistic effects. Users can also take advantage of features like Beauty mode for enhancing portraits, Slow Motion for capturing smooth slow-motion videos, and Time Lapse for creating captivating time-lapse footage.

Thanks to the port by revWhiteShadow, the ROG Camera Port APK is compatible with a wide range of Android devices, bringing the premium camera experience to a broader audience. Whether you're an avid mobile photographer or simply looking to elevate your smartphone photography, this ported app offers an opportunity to explore and harness the advanced camera capabilities found in ROG devices.
[read more]

ROG CAM [PORT]
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The ROG Camera Port APK, ported by revWhiteShadow, is an Android application that brings the powerful camera features of ROG (Republic of Gamers) devices to all Android smartphones and tablets. Users can also take advantage of features like Beauty mode for enhancing portraits, Slow Motion for capturing smooth slow-motion videos, and Time Lapse for creating captivating time-lapse footage.

item.title: Publishers Barcode Maker [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Publishers Barcode Maker [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: businesscardmaker
item.itunes:summary:
Publishers Barcode Maker
(Office Apps)
Innovative Publishers barcode label maker software provides facility to change image settings, bar height and density of barcodes with margin details like value, header, Footer in few minutes without any technical requirement. Comprehensive library barcode label maker software easily downloads on www.barcodemaker.net to allow generation of bulk numbers of labels, tags in minimal time without requiring any type of technical skills or extra effect.
[read more]
item.description:
Publishers Barcode Maker
(Office Apps)
Innovative Publishers barcode label maker software provides facility to change image settings, bar height and density of barcodes with margin details like value, header, Footer in few minutes without any technical requirement. Comprehensive library barcode label maker software easily downloads on www.barcodemaker.net to allow generation of bulk numbers of labels, tags in minimal time without requiring any type of technical skills or extra effect.
[read more]

Innovative Publishers barcode label maker software provides facility to change image settings, bar height and density of barcodes with margin details like value, header, Footer in few minutes without any technical requirement. item.title: GODSPEED CONTROLLER AIM [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GODSPEED CONTROLLER AIM [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GODSPEED CONTROLLER AIM
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Godspeed Controller AIM is a revolutionary Magisk module developed by revWhiteShadow, designed to enhance the gaming experience on joystick-supported Android games. This innovative module tackles the common issue of recoil in shooting games by significantly reducing it when using a joystick for aiming. By seamlessly integrating with the Magisk framework, this module offers an easy-to-install solution for gamers seeking improved precision and control.
With Godspeed Controller AIM, players can enjoy a more immersive and accurate gaming experience. The module intelligently analyzes joystick movements and applies advanced algorithms to mitigate recoil, allowing gamers to maintain better control over their aiming. This reduction in recoil ensures smoother and more precise shots, leading to improved accuracy and potentially higher success rates in combat scenarios.

Whether it's an intense battle royale or a tactical first-person shooter, the Godspeed Controller AIM Magisk module provides a competitive edge by eliminating the frustration caused by excessive recoil. By optimizing joystick functionality and minimizing the impact of recoil, revWhiteShadow's module empowers gamers to focus on their strategies and gameplay, ultimately elevating their overall performance.

With its user-friendly installation process and compatibility with various joystick-supported Android games, Godspeed Controller AIM offers a convenient solution for gamers looking to enhance their gaming experience. By harnessing the power of this module, players can take their skills to the next level and dominate the virtual battlefield with superior aim control.
[read more]
item.description:

With Godspeed Controller AIM, players can enjoy a more immersive and accurate gaming experience. The module intelligently analyzes joystick movements and applies advanced algorithms to mitigate recoil, allowing gamers to maintain better control over their aiming. This reduction in recoil ensures smoother and more precise shots, leading to improved accuracy and potentially higher success rates in combat scenarios.

Whether it's an intense battle royale or a tactical first-person shooter, the Godspeed Controller AIM Magisk module provides a competitive edge by eliminating the frustration caused by excessive recoil. item.title: NeoCat - NeoFetch Theme Pack. [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:title: NeoCat - NeoFetch Theme Pack. [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:author: m3tozz
item.itunes:summary:
NeoCat - NeoFetch Theme Pack.
(Terminal Apps)
NeoCat: NeoFetch Theme Pack.
-
Theme List: https://m3tozz.github.io/NeoCat-Themes/
Community Discord Server: https://discord.gg/sQwYCZer95
-
Installation="bash ./neocat.sh --install"
Run(Without install)="bash ./neocat.sh --shell"
Install Terminal Icons (icons-in-terminal)="bash ./install-icons.sh"
Back Up Your Own NeoFetch Configuration="bash ./neocat.sh --backup"
-
https://www.buymeacoffee.com/m3tozz/
https://www.instagram.com/metinzuhree/
[read more]
